underlying_goal: User wanted guidance on which Claude Agent Teams mode (regular team, ultrawork, swarm) to use for organizing and consolidating 100+ custom skills with existing audit reports and roadmaps
friction_detail: First attempt failed due to expired OAuth token, then Claude began autonomously exploring the filesystem instead of just answering the strategic question, leading the user to interrupt.
brief_summary: User asked for strategic advice on which Agent Teams mode to use for a skill consolidation project; Claude started to answer but then pivoted to unnecessary file exploration, prompting user interruption.
